title: Why the First Bite Tastes Best

analysis.object: T655: Why the First Bite Tastes Best depth analysis

sensory_adaptation_eml1.description: Sensory adaptation: exponential decay of response; EML-1
sensory_adaptation_eml1.reason: Adaptation is EML-1: exponential receptor desensitization with repeated identical stimulation

maximum_info_first.description: First bite: maximum EML-2 measurement information (signal most novel)
maximum_info_first.reason: First bite is EML-2 peak: maximum information from comparison to baseline; unrepeatable

hedonic_treadmill.description: Hedonic treadmill: EML-2 habituates; only EML-inf categorification produces permanent change
hedonic_treadmill.reason: Hedonic treadmill is depth theorem: EML-2 measurement habituates; permanent joy requires EML-inf

analysis.theorem: T655: Why the First Bite Tastes Best (S934).

key_theorem: T655: Why the First Bite Tastes Best (S934).
